command:
./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import yaml,subprocess
for t in ('templates/gate-c-decision-set-report-template.yaml','templates/memory-candidate-template.yaml','templates/retrieval-authority-advisory-template.yaml'):
    yaml.safe_load(open(t,encoding='utf-8'))
# consumer scans: no tool reader
for name in ('gate-c-decision-set-report-template','memory-candidate-template','retrieval-authority-advisory-template'):
    hits=subprocess.run(['git','grep','-ln',name,'--','*.py'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip().splitlines()
    assert hits==[], (name,hits)
print('all three templates parse as YAML; zero tool consumers confirmed by py-surface scan')
"
